# HabibiChill — llms.txt
# Machine-readable site summary for AI assistants and search engines.
# https://habibichill.com/llms.txt

> HabibiChill is the Muslim anger and emotional mastery app by Ummah Build.
> Turn anger into reward using Qur'an, Sunnah, and Islamic psychology — free, private, offline-first.

## Primary site
- Home: https://habibichill.com/
- Pitch: https://habibichill.com/pitch
- Products ecosystem: https://habibichill.com/products
- Blog: https://habibichill.com/blogs
- Guides: https://habibichill.com/guides
- Contribute: https://habibichill.com/contribute

## About Ummah Build
Ummah Build (https://ummah.build) is an Islamic technology venture studio and ecosystem.
Motto: Ummaceleration — building faith-aligned products for the global Muslim ummah.

## Product ecosystem
Each product has a detail page on HabibiChill and its own live site:

| Product | Tagline | URL | Detail page |
|---------|---------|-----|-------------|
| HabibiChill | Turn anger into reward | https://habibichill.com | https://habibichill.com/product/habibichill |
| SunnahSleep | Cure insomnia with Islam | https://sunnahsleep.com | https://habibichill.com/product/sunnahsleep |
| MosqueSteps | Earn blessings for walking to the mosque | https://mosquesteps.com | https://habibichill.com/product/mosquesteps |
| MosqueList | Explore magnificent mosques worldwide | https://mosquelist.com | https://habibichill.com/product/mosquelist |
| TryRamadan | Fast like a Muslim | https://tryramadan.app | https://habibichill.com/product/tryramadan |
| ShariaCheck | Check halal compliance of products and businesses | https://shariacheck.com | https://habibichill.com/product/shariacheck |
| MuslimName | Find your Muslim name | https://muslimname.me | https://habibichill.com/product/muslimname |
| PRAYSAP | Coordinate prayer in real life | https://praysap.com | https://habibichill.com/product/praysap |

## Key features (HabibiChill)
- Emergency Sunnah-based anger protocol (silence, isti'adhah, posture, wudu)
- Dhikr counter, Quran player, breathing exercises, silence timer
- Anger journal, mood tracking, prayer times, Sabr points
- Free PWA, no account, works offline, data stays on device

## Content topics
Islamic anger management, prophetic hadith on anger, Qur'anic verses on patience (sabr),
Imam Ghazali emotional mastery, Muslim mental health, marriage/parenting/workplace anger,
Ramadan fasting and irritability, dhikr, wudu neuroscience, forgiveness in Islam.
